Changelog.Title: Plinko Minigame
Changelog.Description: "Group Exclusive! (Available Every 30 Minutes)"

Changelog.Title: Boost GUI 🧱
Changelog.Description: "You can now View Your Active Boosts!"

Changelog.Text: 📈 Bunny Progression Shop Rewards
• Lv. 0 🟫 Dirt Digging (100 EXP) | +25 EXP/Item | Free Gift Slot #1 (24h) | 1 Shop Slot
• Lv. 1 ⚙️ Iron Root (250 EXP) | Faster Free Gift (20h)
• Lv. 2 🧱 Copper Leaf (600 EXP) | +35 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot | Faster Free Gift (18h)
• Lv. 3 🥉 Bronze Berry (1,200 EXP) | 2.5h Shop Refresh | Faster Free Gift (15h)
• Lv. 4 🥈 Silver Sack (2,456 EXP) | +50 EXP/Item | 12h Free Gift | x1.2 Free Item EXP
• Lv. 5 🥇 Golden Guard (4,600 EXP) | +60 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot | 10h Free Gift
• Lv. 6 💿 Platinum Petal (10,000 EXP) | +85 EXP/Item | 2h Shop Refresh | 8h Free Gift
• Lv. 7 🟢 Emerald Vine (15,000 EXP) | +100 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot | Hidden Stocks I (5% No-Consume)
• Lv. 8 🔵 Sapphire Seed (22,002 EXP) | +120 EXP/Item | Unlocks Discount Slot (5% Max) | 6h Free Gift
• Lv. 9 🔴 Ruby Rose (28,012 EXP) | 1.5h Shop Refresh | 8% Max Discount | 4h Free Gift
• Lv. 10 🔍 Diamond Hunter (37,541 EXP) | Keep the Changes I (5% Refund) | +1 Shop Slot | 12% Max Discount
• Lv. 11 🍀 Crystal Clover (54,842 EXP) | +220 EXP/Item | 2 Free Gift Slots | 3h Free Gift
• Lv. 12 🟠 Amber Antler (73,541 EXP) | +250 EXP/Item | +1 Shop Slot (MAX) | 18% Max Disc | x3 Free EXP
• Lv. 13 ✨ Star Spirit (89,653 EXP) | +300 EXP/Item | 1h Shop Refresh | 22% Max Discount
• Lv. 14 🏆 Elite Merchant (110,444 EXP) | 3h Free Gift | 25% Max Discount | x5 Free Item EXP
• Lv. 15 👑 GRANDMASTER | +1000 EXP/Item | Keep the Changes II (10% Refund) | Hidden Stocks II (15% No-Consume) | 40% Max Discount | x10 Free Item EXP
💡 Mechanics Explained
• Hidden Stocks: A chance that an item won't be removed from the shop after purchase, letting you buy it again!
• Keep the Changes: Your Bunny friend has a chance to return a percentage of the currency you spent.
• Free Multiplier: Higher tiers drastically boost the EXP earned from claiming your daily freebies.
📢 Notice
• More adjustments to the game performance! (it should feel smoother to play the game now!)
• Brand new updates and changes are coming your way soon!

Changelog.Text: 🥚 The Great Egg Hunt
• Discover 12 Special Eggs hidden around the map for a massive event buff! (8 Available in Part 1)

Changelog.Description: "A list on how to get them is available below!"

Changelog.Text: 🟢 EASY TIER
• Noob Egg: 1 in 1,000 chance from clicking the main egg.
• Cloud Egg: Count the clouds in the sky... or just enter code 0023!
• Easter Basket: A rare drop from the brand new Easter Egg at spawn.
• Chocolate Egg: Hidden somewhere inside the Event World.
🟡 MEDIUM TIER
• Tribe Egg: A rare drop (1/2.5k) from collecting Eggs in the Event World.
• AFK Egg: Stand perfectly still and do nothing for 20 minutes.
• Crowned Egg: Finish the first 10 Contest Bear questlines.
• Pumpkin Egg: Finish the Scarecrow's questline.
✨ HARD TIER+
• Coming Soon

Changelog.Text: • Add the portal effect & zone area for when teleporting to somewhere
• Fixed Shop prices & Nerfing seed price for early game
• Some items in the shop has been reduced in order to make room for next update!
• Auto Rejoin is now fixed and tracks playermovement & input correctly
• New Disable Auto Rejoin Settings
• Added Chat Cooldown to prevent spamming
• Fixed Chat input issue
• Removed Valentine Egg
• Fix collision issue with black bear NPC
• Reverted lobby back to original. Thank you for participating the event
• Valentines reward will be given out in the next major update
We hope you enjoy this small update while waiting for something huge.
